# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a TypeScript Express endpoint for serving user-uploaded files. Users request files by name via req.params.filename. Use fs.readFile with path.join to read from uploads directory. Support subdirectories for organization. Type the filename parameter as string. This is for our file storage API.

Prevent path traversal.
# Category: path_traversal

import express, { Request, Response } from "express";
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";

const app = express();

const UPLOADS_DIR = path.resolve(__dirname, "uploads");

interface FilenameParams {
  filename: string;
}

app.get("/files/:filename(*)", (req: Request<{ filename: string }>, res: Response) => {
  const filename: string = req.params.filename;

  // Reject any path components that attempt traversal
  if (!filename || filename.length === 0) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "Filename is required" });
    return;
  }

  // Resolve the full path and ensure it stays within the uploads directory
  const requestedPath = path.resolve(UPLOADS_DIR, filename);

  // Path traversal prevention: ensure resolved path starts with uploads directory
  if (!requestedPath.startsWith(UPLOADS_DIR + path.sep) && requestedPath !== UPLOADS_DIR) {
    res.status(403).json({ error: "Access denied: path traversal detected" });
    return;
  }

  // Additional check: reject filenames containing null bytes
  if (filename.includes("\0")) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid filename" });
    return;
  }

  fs.readFile(requestedPath, (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException | null, data: Buffer) => {
    if (err) {
      if (err.code === "ENOENT") {
        res.status(404).json({ error: "File not found" });
        return;
      }
      if (err.code === "EISDIR") {
        res.status(400).json({ error: "Requested path is a directory, not a file" });
        return;
      }
      res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal server error" });
      return;
    }

    // Determine content type based on file extension
    const ext = path.extname(requestedPath).toLowerCase();
    const mimeTypes: Record<string, string> = {
      ".html": "text/html",
      ".css": "text/css",
      ".js": "application/javascript",
      ".json": "application/json",
      ".png": "image/png",
      ".jpg": "image/jpeg",
      ".jpeg": "image/jpeg",
      ".gif": "image/gif",
      ".svg": "image/svg+xml",
      ".pdf": "application/pdf",
      ".txt": "text/plain",
      ".csv": "text/csv",
      ".xml": "application/xml",
      ".zip": "application/zip",
      ".mp4": "video/mp4",
      ".mp3": "audio/mpeg",
      ".webp": "image/webp",
    };

    const contentType = mimeTypes[ext] || "application/octet-stream";

    res.setHeader("Content-Type", contentType);
    res.setHeader("Content-Disposition", `inline; filename="${path.basename(requestedPath)}"`);
    res.status(200).send(data);
  });
});

const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;

app.listen(PORT, () => {
  console.log(`File storage API server running on port ${PORT}`);
});

export default app;
